theme: sports season that rain cannot wreck
title: Rainproof Season
strategies: first-fit lexicographic edge coloring: place every pair on the earliest legal slot in pair order, blind to round-robin structure and to the weather scenarios

textbook circle-method round robin: the most compact possible single round robin (N-1 dates, zero slack used) -- every team is busy every date inside the compact zone, so it has zero common free slots there

scenario-aware covering design: start from the compact round robin, then run simulated annealing that directly minimizes the true worst-case-scenario objective, planting slack dates exactly where jointly-cancelled pairs of teams need a shared nearby free date
